image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wondered how life evolves slowly, step by step?
Context visual: Gradualism suggests that evolution happens in small, incremental changes over long periods.
Escalation visual: Unlike rapid shifts or sudden appearances of new species, gradualism focuses on the slow build-up.
Evidence visual: Fossil records often show these subtle changes—over millions of years—like the evolution of horses from small, forest-dw
Payoff visual: But uncertainty looms. Not all species follow this path. Other factors like extinction and environmental shifts complica
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into evolution? Subscribe for more intriguing science!
